payload.answer: Saved an impression about “Brutto” with uncertain linkage to the Brutto London restaurant, since “Brutto” may also refer to an article alias.
payload.decision: Preserve ambiguity: treat the note “Brutto was better than expected” as likely referring to the existing Brutto London restaurant, but do not fully resolve between restaurant vs. article alias without more context.

entity_resolution.reason: Existing context contains “Brutto restaurant in London” and “Brutto article alias.” The new note is a generic statement about “Brutto,” which could refer to either. Record it as an assessment of “Brutto” and associate with the restaurant only as a best-effort, low-to-medium confidence.

memory_cards.statement: Recorded impression: “Brutto was better than expected.” (Ambiguous: could refer to the Brutto London restaurant or another Brutto alias.)

details: Created a new memory card for an impression statement about “Brutto.”
